71 5A F4 2E 76 7A 5F 66 F1 BA F9 C6 82 20 95 13 50 81 95 37 77 42 20 57 80 42 B8 84 FA 09 6A CE E5 0D 86 1E 74 CD 5A 96 A1 95 C4 E6 12 9C CD 91 F7 71 A3 9B A4 B0 94 02 82 C8 E8 0B 04 AD 75 58 0A DC BB ```
PQConfig_SDC421B.dv

HS27S17(SKG2718) > 300 nit

480347825e6d95 > Target Max PQ v2 2575 (320.26 cd/m^2)

PQConfig_SDC421B.dv > DolbyVision_CMDEF.icm > PQ_Tuning_Only_ICM_Generic


.\Insert_DVB1.exe -input PQConfig_SDC421B.dv -extract_dvb1 extracted_blob.bin
.\dovi_generate_icc.exe -parse_icc extracted_blob.bin
.\Insert_DVB1.exe -input SRGB_to_Gamma2p2_SDR.icm -dvb1 extracted_blob.bin -out SRGB_to_Gamma2p2_SDR_DVB1.icm
